topic: Flight Price Watch chapters — what's inside the app (EN)

lines.text: One app — all the cheapest flights from Vilnius and Warsaw. Here's what's inside.
lines.visualPrompt: hand holding smartphone with travel app, airport window with airplane in background, cinematic

lines.text: Weekend in Europe: fly out Friday evening, come back Sunday night. The app picks the cheapest cities for you.
lines.visualPrompt: couple walking in european old town evening, warm street lights, weekend city break

lines.text: Formula One: flights to every summer race weekend — prices already compared.
lines.visualPrompt: formula one race car speeding on track, crowd grandstand, motion blur

lines.text: Love concerts? Tomorrowland, Sziget and stadium tours — flight and event date on one page.
lines.visualPrompt: huge concert crowd at night festival, stage lights, hands in the air

lines.text: For hiking — the Alps: Dolomites, Austria, Switzerland. June through September.
lines.visualPrompt: hiker on alpine mountain trail, dolomites peaks, sunny summer day, epic landscape

lines.text: And for winter — Tenerife. When it's pouring in Vilnius, it's twenty five degrees there.
lines.visualPrompt: tenerife ocean beach with volcano in background, sunny winter sun, palm trees

lines.text: Prices are checked automatically around the clock, and the chart shows when it's cheapest to buy.
lines.visualPrompt: real Flight Price Watch tracker page screen recording

lines.text: It's completely free. The link is in the description.
lines.visualPrompt: happy traveler with backpack walking to airport gate, golden hour light
